## Summary

- Describe the change.

## Validation

- [ ] Backend unit and coverage checks pass.
- [ ] Backend integration tests pass when the change affects API, persistence or security behavior.
- [ ] Frontend lint, tests and build pass when the change affects the UI.
- [ ] OpenAPI contract impact was reviewed when endpoints or DTOs changed.

## Security And Operations

- [ ] No secrets, credentials or local-only values were committed.
- [ ] Database migrations are backward-compatible or documented.
- [ ] New dependencies are necessary and covered by Dependency Review/Trivy.

## Screenshots Or API Evidence

Add screenshots, request/response examples or Swagger/OpenAPI notes when useful.
